description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, set within a landscaped lot. The exterior features a combination of white and light gray walls, large windows, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The front yard includes a driveway leading to a garage, flanked by manicured shrubs and trees. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool and a patio area, bordered by a privacy fence and additional greenery. The house has multiple entry points, including a prominent main entrance with steps and a covered porch. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and a bay window visible on one side.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped front and back yards, and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, pool, and privacy fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, garage, and side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a modern door flanked by landscaping
